podcasts.name: Davie Fogarty
podcasts.title: How Daily Mentor helped fix the business
podcasts.transcript: I've literally near turned the business on its head since joining before Christmas. It was just a mess. I just went, "Right, everything that I've kind of learned so far from you guys, I just got to implement everything." So, we're actually about to launch on Amazon with your guys and then we've got one of you guys going to do our SEO fix that up. Great. >> I've got Jordy as my growth mentor. He's my >> mirage to keep me accountable. So, he's actually been really good. Yeah, we're trying to implement that as a core function of the accountability through like a 30, 60, 90day road map. >> In a lot of anything in the space of entrepreneur, everyone's trying to sell you something. Everybody's at you going, I do this, I do that. The digital cowboy space is awful. You just don't know what's real, what's not. Daily mentor, it breaks it down. The practicality of the meetings that we have where it just goes, these are the things wrong. This is how you fix it. >> That's it. Nobody else does that. >> Yeah. >> Instead, you get just too hard. I don't know how to fix it. I don't know any more than I did before I got on that call. Whereas now it's just, oh, that's what's wrong, right? And that's how you fix it. It's the truth. Like, it's actually 100% the truth of chalk and cheese.
